title: adonis microcarpa var. intermedia
intro: Adonis microcarpa var. intermedia, also known as the 'Dragon Flower' or 'Flame Lily,' is a perennial plant species within the buttercup family (Ranunculaceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, making it useful in traditional medicine for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Adonis microcarpa var. intermedia include reducing inflammation and pain, as well as treating skin conditions and respiratory problems. Adonis microcarpa var. intermedia is often prepared as a herbal tea or dried powder for use in folk medicine, although its efficacy and safety may vary depending on the specific preparation and individual tolerance.
